properties.Test Case: Make sure all the information about each stage is displayed properly in toolbox
properties.Steps: - Make sure all the information about each stage is displayed properly in toolbox

properties.Test Case: Make a "Reader Template Bloom Pack" in a vernacular collection (irrelevant 5.5 onwards)
properties.Steps: - Make a "Reader Template Bloom Pack" in a vernacular collection (irrelevant 5.5 onwards)

properties.Test Case: Create a collection in a language that uses an Arabic script (which typically requires a larger font to be legible). Test Special Script Settings feature to change the font size for tools. Make sure various DR stages present (larger) letters without needing scroll bars. (JT 6.3: Colin suggested dropping or modifying this test. I think I've modified it enough to be useful again. Originally called for changing the system language to Arabic, but I don't think that's necessary or helpful here. I think the main focus is that the DR setup dialog and tool adapt well to needing a larger font for legibility.)
properties.Steps: Create a collection in a language that uses an Arabic script (which typically requires a larger font to be legible). Test Special Script Settings feature to change the font size for tools. Make sure various DR stages present (larger) letters without needing scroll bars. I think the main focus is that the DR setup dialog and tool adapt well to needing a larger font for legibility.)

properties.Test Case: Cleanup any residue (so it's like your computer wasn't the one used to make the RTB). Install RTB. A new DR/LR should see the decodable and leveled reader settings, including sample words, allowed words and texts.
properties.Steps: - Cleanup any residue (so it's like your computer wasn't the one used to make the RTB). Install RTB. A new DR/LR  should see the decodable and leveled reader settings, including sample words, allowed words and texts.

properties.Test Case: Make a new Decodable book from one of the templates. Should start on the correct stage, with DR toolbox tool showing.
properties.Steps: Make a new Decodable book from one of the templates. Should start on the correct stage, with DR toolbox tool showing.
